notes: Live collection detail capture now covers top-level `collection(id:)` plus the merchant-relevant nested `products` connection slice used by the overlay serializer.

Proxy request scaffold now mirrors the staged collection-membership add runtime slice (`collectionAddProducts(id:, productIds:)` returning `collection { id title handle products(first: 10) { nodes { id title handle } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage } } }` plus `userErrors`). Next step is to capture the same safe membership-add scenario against the dev store and compare mutation payload plus immediate downstream `collection.products` / `product.collections` parity.
